title: agrostis alba subvar. coarctata
intro: Agrostis alba subvar. coarctata, commonly known as a variant of the white bentgrass, is a type of grass native to certain regions. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Agrostis alba subvar. coarctata include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are sometimes used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
